message:
fix(tests): check dispatch_event result instead of silently discarding in lifecycle perf test

Remove unused let _ = binding from the dispatch_event_with_response call
in measure_event_latencies and add .expect() to surface dispatch failures
that would otherwise be silently swallowed, potentially masking real issues
in performance benchmarks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
